0.text: Tubular bronchiectasis centrally in both lungs

1.text: Centriacinar nodular infiltrates with ground glass density in basal and central regions of right lower lobe

2.text: Reticulonodular density increases in right lung apical and posterior segments

3.text: Reticulonodular density increases in left lung upper lobe apicoposterior segment

4.text: Traction bronchiectasis in right lung apical segment
